_provenance: V3.0 (2026-05-14): full voice-brief rewrite. All lines reauthored to Asia voice spec (warm tone, dry content, domestic-administrative register, two-half sentence shape, attribution not editorializing, functional reception-desk lines, no legal opinions in her own voice, no maternal warmth, no sage detachment). Address forms verified: Cula = 'Dr. A. Cula' (outer-circle, honorific always); Murrow = 'Mr. Murrow' (first-name privileges still under review); Pig = 'Mr. Pig'; Swine = 'Mr. Swine'; Crab and Whimsy bare. Coffee reactions preserve V1.4 gate logic with voice-corrected lines. idle_flavor rewritten for reception-desk texture with one specific object per line. State IDs, triggers, and on_dismiss blocks unchanged from V1 for engine compatibility.

states._comment: Beat 2 — player walked behind the counter before pressing E. Asia's professional boundary, then immediate recognition. Bridges into the standard first-meeting flow without skipping content.
lines: Ah — I'm sorry, this area is staff only. We have a —
Oh. Dr. A. Cula. Of course. One moment.
Mr. Pig mentioned you'd be starting today. He mentioned it several times, actually.
He's at his desk. He'll want to speak with you first.
Your blue folder is on the second pile from the left. Mr. Murrow put a sticky note on it. The sticky note says 'Cula' and nothing else, which is how you know it's from Mr. Murrow.

lines.speaker: asia
lines.text: The archive is through that door — Mr. Murrow is in there with the case file when you need him.

states._comment: Beat 2 — standard E-press first meeting. Asia greets, redirects to Pig, identifies the blue folder. Functional warmth: she is doing reception work, not narrating the office.
lines: Dr. A. Cula. Good morning. We've been expecting you — well, Mr. Pig has been expecting you. I've been expecting the courier, but you're here first.
He's at his desk. He'll want to speak with you before anything else.
Your blue folder is on the second pile from the left. If it's not there, check the floor near the second pile. Filing has been approximate this week.

lines.speaker: asia
lines.text: The archive is through that door. Mr. Murrow is in there with the case file when you're ready for him.

states._comment: Hint redirect to Murrow. Attribution structure: she names Murrow as the source, stays out of the case content. The second clause is the diagnosis.
states.line: Mr. Murrow is in the archive. He'll have the case. Mr. Pig has the feelings about the case, which is different.

states._comment: Post-binder, pre-Crab. Domestic translation: the binder rendered as a physical object with weight. No legal opinion.
states.line: You found it. Good. Please don't set it on the reception counter — I had the counter levelled last month and I am not doing it again.

idle_flavor: One moment — yes. The calendar. No, the other calendar.
The sandwich in the fridge labelled 'ASIA — TUESDAY' is mine. The label is clear. The label has always been clear.
Ah — Dr. A. Cula. I'm just on the phone. One moment.
